title: 🌭 Hotdog Delight • [Port]
description: 🌭 Fresh sausages, sizzling hot dogs, and tasty effects! 🍖 Craft, cook, and enjoy — more delicious treats on the way! 🔥
body:
# Take note!
_This is an official port of the original mod, which we posted with the approval of the developer. All rights reserved. Special thanks to Bluemoon8377 for the incredible work on the original mod! For more details and access to the developer's official social media, check out the original mod page and profile:_
> - [Bluemoon8377 Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/bluemoon8377)
> - [Original Hotdog Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hotdog-delight)

_This port of the mod will be updated to match the updates of the original mod, starting with the newest versions._
# Description:
### 🌭 Sausages, Hot Dogs & Flavorful Delights! 🍖

Ever wanted to **craft the perfect sausage?** Now you can! **Tie ingredients with string** to create **juicy sausages**, **cook them** to enhance their effects, and **combine them with bread** for **delicious hot dogs!** 🔥

### 🥩 More Than Just Food!
Cooking sausages **improves hunger & saturation**, while **fatty meats** _(like pork or mutton)_ grant the **Greasy** effect — **preventing hunger loss!** 🍔

### ✨ Endless Tasty Possibilities!
**More sausages, hot dogs, and even fried foods** are coming soon — **stay tuned for updates!** 🍳
